response.justification: Strong staff-level engineer with 15+ years production experience and solid TypeScript/cloud foundation. Recent role at re:cinq involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP work, suggesting a pivot toward GenAI. However, resume lacks demonstrated expertise in critical requirements: vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM optimization, and documented evidence of 8+ years building AI-driven solutions (vs. general software engineering). The ambiguity around what 'AI-agent infrastructure' entails—whether this person builds AI systems or tooling around them—presents a significant uncertainty.
strengths: 15+ years staff-level software engineering with proven ability to architect complex systems across full stack and multiple domains
Strong TypeScript/Node.js expertise and current work with MCP (Model Context Protocol) and agentic workflows at re:cinq
Demonstrated technical leadership through mentoring, training programs, and multi-year tenure in senior roles across diverse engineering challenges
concerns: No demonstrated experience with vector databases or RAG architectures—both explicitly required and core to the role's technical foundation
Resume shows 15 years general software engineering but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years specifically developing AI-driven solutions or working with LLMs
Current GenAI work at re:cinq is vaguely described; unclear whether candidate builds AI systems, evaluation pipelines, or primarily infrastructure tooling—critical distinction for this role

key_factors.factor: Vector DBs and RAG architecture expertise
Current MCP and agentic workflow experience
